name: RAG-Eval-LLM-Judge
description: Cross-Family LLM-Judge Agreement Dataset for Institutional Retrieval-Augmented Generation. 9 LLM judges across 5 model families (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google-commercial, DeepSeek, Open-weight) score 570 query-document pairs from an institutional repository (Iowa State University DSpace) plus 1,137 pairs from three public corpora (TREC RAG 2024, TREC-COVID, BEIR scifact). Includes intra-judge self-consistency subset, bootstrap CIs, Gwet AC2, bias diagnostics, and an UMBRELA single-judge baseline. The first published five-family pairwise quadratic-weighted Cohen's kappa matrix on a bounded 0-3 ordinal relevance rubric at >= 500 paired observations with within-family controls and open-weight peers as first-class participants.
citeAs: @misc{sukul2026rageval, title = {RAG-Eval-LLM-Judge: Cross-Family LLM-Judge Agreement Dataset}, author = {Sukul, Adisak}, year = {2026}, url = {https://github.com/asukul/RAG-Eval-LLM-Judge}}
rai:annotationsPerItem: 9 LLM-judge integer scores (0-3 ordinal) per query-document pair; null when judge fails to return a parseable score
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: Each judge sees the same (query, document-truncated-to-1500-chars) pair and returns an integer 0-3 per a published rubric (0=irrelevant, 1=topical, 2=partial, 3=fully answers). 5 worked examples calibrate the rubric at prompt time. Temperature = 0.0. Per-judge JSONs preserve raw integer/null outputs without further processing.
rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan: GitHub-hosted; minor fixes patched in-tree, major versions tagged. Issues responded within 30 days.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Documents truncated to 1500 chars (judge-input cap) before scoring. Scores parsed via regex from judge text response. Failed parses recorded as null.

distribution.name: github-repo
distribution.description: GitHub repository containing all dataset files, code, and papers.

distribution.name: trec-rag-2024-judges-json
distribution.description: 9-judge per-pair scores + NIST human qrels on the 537-pair stratified-balanced TREC RAG 2024 sample.

distribution.name: trec-covid-judges-json
distribution.description: 9-judge per-pair scores + BEIR-distributed TREC-COVID human qrels on a 300-pair sample.

distribution.name: beir-scifact-judges-json
distribution.description: 9-judge per-pair scores + BEIR scifact human qrels on a 300-pair sample (all-positive labels; precision-only evaluation).

distribution.name: within-corpus-per-judge-files
distribution.description: Within-corpus (Iowa State University DSpace) 9 per-judge JSONs, each containing 570 (query, document) pairs scored by one of the 9 judges. Each file holds the full retrieval ranks + truncated document previews + integer scores.

distribution.name: within-corpus-merged
distribution.description: Merged 9-judge multijudge file: aggregates per judge + 9x9 pairwise quadratic-weighted Cohen's kappa matrix on 570 pairs.

distribution.name: intra-judge-consistency-json
distribution.description: Intra-judge self-consistency subset: 50 TREC RAG 2024 pairs x 9 judges x 3 runs each (1,350 score records). Includes mean intra-judge kappa, mean kappa vs human, and pairwise intra-run kappa values.

distribution.name: umbrela-baseline
distribution.description: UMBRELA single-judge baseline (Upadhyay et al. 2024 verbatim prompt + GPT-4o) on the same 537-pair TREC RAG 2024 stratified sample, for direct comparison against the 9-judge ensemble.

distribution.name: bootstrap-cis-json
distribution.description: Bootstrap 95% confidence intervals (1000 resamples, seed=42) on every reported headline kappa value across all four corpora.

distribution.name: gwet-ac2-json
distribution.description: Quadratic-weighted Gwet AC2 alongside Cohen kappa for triangulation under marginal-distribution skew (kappa paradox).

distribution.name: bias-diagnostics-json
distribution.description: Bias diagnostics: 5x5 family conditional-mean matrix + per-judge marginal score distributions + length-stratification (skipped due to uniform truncation).

recordSet.name: external-validation-records
recordSet.description: Per-pair LLM-judge scores plus human qrel for each of the three external-validation corpora (TREC RAG 2024 n=537, TREC-COVID n=300, BEIR scifact n=300).

field.name: query_id
field.description: Corpus-specific query identifier (e.g., '2024-217488' for TREC RAG 2024).

field.name: human_rel
field.description: Ground-truth relevance label (0-3 ordinal for TREC RAG / TREC-COVID; binary 0/1 for BEIR scifact mapped to 0/3).

field.name: judge_scores
field.description: Per-judge integer score (0-3) or null. Keyed by judge label.

recordSet.name: within-corpus-records
recordSet.description: Per-pair retrieval entries for the within-corpus 9-judge ablation on Iowa State University DSpace (570 pairs total: 57 queries x top-10 retrieval). Each per-judge file contributes 570 records via the queries[].retrieved[] nested structure.

field.name: judge_label
field.description: Display name of the judge that produced this record (e.g., 'Claude Sonnet 4.6 (OpenRouter)').

field.name: rank
field.description: 1-10 rank within top-K retrieval for the query.

field.name: point_id
field.description: Qdrant point UUID (deterministic across judges; this is what guarantees retrieval-determinism alignment so that scores from different judges are positionally comparable).

field.name: judge_score
field.description: Integer 0-3 from the rubric, or null when the judge failed to return a parseable score.
